chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-196 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 898/25 3.For orders on CMA 899/25 4.For hearing of main case 25-03-2025 Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG. **** Learned DPG files statement on behalf of respondent No.4, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner. Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
